selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:

"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a clear understanding of the different types of fake content, such as bots, trolls, and propaganda. Once you are aware of these types of content, you can take steps to identify and flag them for removal. Additionally, using fact-checking tools and sources can help verify the accuracy of information shared on social media. It is also important to be mindful of your own biases and to seek out diverse perspectives to gain a more well-rounded understanding of the issues at hand. Furthermore, engaging in respectful and constructive dialogue with others can help to build trust and foster a more inclusive online environment. By taking these steps, individuals can play an active role in maintaining the integrity and authenticity of social media platforms.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a clear understanding of the different types of fake content, such as bots, trolls, and propaganda. Once you are aware of these types of content, you can take steps to identify and flag them for removal. Additionally, using fact-checking tools and sources can help verify the accuracy of information shared on social media. It is also important to be mindful of your own biases and to seek out diverse perspectives to gain a more well-rounded understanding of the issues at hand. Furthermore, engaging in respectful and constructive dialogue with others can help to build trust and foster a more inclusive online environment. By taking these steps, individuals can play an active role in maintaining the integrity and authenticity of social media platforms.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, one must first understand the different types of fake content (bots, trolls, propaganda) and take steps to identify and flag them. Fact-checking tools and sources can help verify information, while being mindful of biases and seeking diverse perspectives is crucial. Engaging in respectful dialogue with others helps build trust and foster a more inclusive online environment.
